instruction: 帮我把成本数据整理到汇总文档里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '成本项目'
ws['B1'] = '预算(万元)'
ws['C1'] = '实际(万元)'
ws['D1'] = '差异(万元)'
ws['A2'] = '原材料'
ws['B2'] = 3200
ws['C2'] = 3050
ws['D2'] = -150
ws['A3'] = '人工'
ws['B3'] = 1800
ws['C3'] = 1920
ws['D3'] = 120
ws['A4'] = '制造费用'
ws['B4'] = 600
ws['C4'] = 580
ws['D4'] = -20
ws['A5'] = '期间费用'
ws['B5'] = 800
ws['C5'] = 850
ws['D5'] = 50
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/cost_breakdown.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把成本数据整理到汇总文档里
从/home/user/Desktop/cost_breakdown.xlsx中计算总实际成本（3050+1920+580+850），追加到/home/user/Desktop/cost_summary.txt末尾：'本期实际总成本：6400万元'，保存
